visual_description: In a dimly lit, cluttered room filled with metal pots and shelves, a blonde man in a dark coat points forward with his right hand while two other men in dark suits stand behind him, also pointing. A man in a brown jacket stands nearby, looking forward with a serious expression.
audio_description: A male voice speaks urgently in Mandarin, shouting commands and urging action, creating a tense atmosphere.
